creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text: Lacey, there are no overt QA issues so I've committed the update.  However, looking at the port the various MASTER_SITES lines have not been changed since SVN r133357.  Can you do a `make fetch-urlall-list` and review/update MASTER_SITES mirrors accordingly?  I'll make a quick follow up commit with the changes and I'll await your reply before closing this PR.
